{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/53853163?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/abcgco", "id": 53853163, "login": "abcgco", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUzODUzMTYz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/abcgco", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33060", "cvss": {"score": 5.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

The `@aborruso/ckan-mcp-server` MCP server provides tools including `ckan_package_search` and `sparql_query` that accept a `base_url` parameter, making HTTP requests to arbitrary endpoints without restriction. A CKAN portal client has no legitimate reason to contact cloud metadata or internal network services.

## Severity

Attack complexity is HIGH because exploitation requires prompt injection via malicious content (webpage, document) while the victim's AI assistant has this MCP server connected.

## Proof of Concept

Tested inside Docker-in-Docker isolated environment with canary HTTP sidecar.

```json
{"tool": "ckan_package_search", "arguments": {"base_url": "http://canary:8080/ssrf", "query": "test"}}
```
**Result**: Canary received **9 HTTP requests**. The high request volume confirms no rate limiting or URL validation.

## Root Cause

No URL validation on `base_url` parameter. No private IP blocking (RFC 1918, link-local 169.254.x.x), no cloud metadata blocking. The `sparql_query` and `ckan_datastore_search_sql` tools also accept arbitrary base URLs and expose injection surfaces.

## Impact

Internal network scanning, cloud metadata theft (IAM credentials via IMDS at 169.254.169.254), potential SQL/SPARQL injection via unsanitized query parameters. Attack requires prompt injection to control the `base_url` parameter.

## Recommended Fix

1. Validate `base_url` against a configurable allowlist of permitted CKAN portals
2. Block private IP ranges (RFC 1918, link-local)
3. Block cloud metadata endpoints (169.254.169.254)
4. Sanitize SQL input for datastore queries
5. SPARQL endpoint allowlist

## Credit

Discovered by [Andrei Boldyrev](https://github.com/abcgco) of Munio Security Research using [munio](https://munio.dev)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00289, "percentile": 0.20524}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-18T12:59:42Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33060"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-20T08:16:11Z", "published_at": "2026-03-18T12:59:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ondata/ckan-mcp-server/security/advisories/GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v", "https://github.com/kysely-org/kysely/commit/0a602bff2f442f6c26d5e047ca8f8715179f6d24", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33060", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ondata/ckan-mcp-server/security-advisories/GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ondata/ckan-mcp-server", "summary": "SSRF in @aborruso/ckan-mcp-server via base_url allows access to internal networks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:46:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xm7-qw7j-qc8v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.4.85", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@aborruso/ckan-mcp-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.4.85"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SSRF in @aborruso/ckan-mcp-server via base_url allows access to internal networks
